data.title: Amazon gets back together with FedEx to expand free returns options
data.description: The move comes after an end to Amazon's ground delivery contract with FedEx in 2019 chilled the companies' relationship.

data.title: Skullcandy taps Riskified for fraud prevention
data.description: Over the course of 12 months, including Q4's holiday-season peak, Skullcandy said it kept losses to fraud "negligible." It said it maintained low chargeback rates averaging about 0.06% during the 12-month period.

data.title: Oracle embeds AI agents in finance, supply chain and procurement systems
data.description: For distributors and manufacturers, the development could affect how orders are initiated and processed across digital channels.

data.title: Manhattan Associates: Only 7% of retailers reach unified commerce maturity
data.description: While the report shows incremental progress since its 2023 launch, 33% of retailers remain in a “basic” category, indicating limited integration across channels.

data.title: Shippo adds to functionality for AI-powered shipping insights, analytics
data.description: New capabilities include AI-generated insights emails, interactive shipping performance maps and deeper cost visibility, according to Shippo. The update to Shippo Intelligence also adds two dashboards focused on surcharges and positive adjustments.
